audit_items.proof_trace: urestubs.c contains no pointer dereferences at all: both functions operate exclusively on scalar integer values (ucs4_t = unsigned long, confirmed ure.h:104). The static masks[32] array access is bounded by a loop i=0..31, and all external function calls (uctoupper, ucisprop) receive scalars by value. The property's assertion is vacuously true because the set of pointer dereferences in this file is empty.
